# Default IDs

Specify default values for device and profile IDs.

## Overview

Certain routines require a device ID or profile ID. In some cases, a "default ID" can be used.

## Constants

- **cmDefaultDeviceID**
- **cmDefaultProfileID**
title: Default IDs
